name: Northgate Dental
summary: A booking-ready site that filled the calendar.
intro: Northgate Dental needed a site that turned local searches into booked appointments. We rebuilt around speed and a frictionless booking flow.
challenge: An old, slow site buried the booking link and barely ranked locally.
approach: Rebuilt on a performance budget, surfaced booking everywhere, and tightened local SEO.
outcome: Bookings more than doubled within 90 days, with load time cut to 2.1s.

name: Maple & Co
summary: From invisible to top-3 in local search.
intro: A neighbourhood retailer with great products and no online presence. We built the brand and the visibility to match.
challenge: Strong in person, invisible online — no brand system, no rankings.
approach: New identity, consistent voice, and a focused local-SEO push.
outcome: Reached top-3 for key local terms within a quarter and lifted footfall.

name: Vela Logistics
summary: Doubled demo requests with a full-partner engagement.
intro: A B2B operator that needed build, brand and growth handled as one. We ran the whole stream.
challenge: Fragmented vendors and a site that didn't reflect the quality of the service.
approach: Single engagement: rebuild, brand refresh, and an outreach engine on top.
outcome: Demo requests doubled while the team stopped juggling agencies.
